title: ceratozamia mexicana var. latifolia
intro: Ceratozamia mexicana var. latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved Mexican cycad, is a plant species in the family Zamiaceae, native to Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The broad-leaved Mexican cycad is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for use in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
